zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto von Hessen I於1272年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟馬布格時，他的父親Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen28歲，母親Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg27歲。他和Adelheid von Ravensberg至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1328年1月17日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇艾爾茲比斯圖姆 麥音阿道夫_享年56歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erna.  Scandinavian Hjalmer.

habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (German Hessen), a region (present-day federal state) in Germany named with the German dative plural form of the name of its inhabitants, the Hessians. Compare Hess 1.

variants.name: Haessig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Reiner.
habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse, from the adjectival form of its German name (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hesser
meanings: nickname for a chaser at a hunt, from an agent derivative of Middle High German hessen ‘to hound’.
habitational name for someone from Hesse (see   Hessen   1).

variants.name: Hess
meanings: German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the territory of Hesse (see   Hessen   1).
South German: from a short form of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hesso, a derivative of a compound name formed with hadu ‘strife’ as the first element, or from a pet form of Herman or Hendrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto von Hessen I was born in 1272, in Marburg, Hesse, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, was 28 and his mother, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 27. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Adelheid von Ravensberg. He died on 17 January 1328, in Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 56, and was buried in Hesse, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto von Hessen I est né en 1272, à Marburg, Hessen, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Adelheid von Ravensberg. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1328, à Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Hessen, Saint-Empire romain.

de.Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empi: Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Otto von Hessen I 1272 in Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen 28 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 27. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Ravensberg mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Januar 1328 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto von Hessen I è nato il nel 1272 nel Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Adelheid von Ravensberg. Morì il 17 gennaio 1328, nel Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ko.Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empi: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 카셀
ko.lifeSummary: Otto von Hessen I(이)가 1272년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센 마버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Ravensberg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 1월 17일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 르즈비스투 맹츠 카셀에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto von Hessen I nasceu em 1272, em Marburg, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Adelheid von Ravensberg. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1328, em Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.Kassel, Erzbistum Mainz, Holy Roman Empi: кассел, эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto von Hessen I родился в 1272 г. в местности марбург, Гессен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Adelheid von Ravensberg. Он умер 17 января 1328 г. в местности кассел, эрзбистум меинз, хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Гессен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.
